body:
Fix the equations for 2d nhm. Dry rising bubble is now rising.

It is uglier than ClimaCore bubble because we are not including flux correction or 2nd order diffusion (something to discuss for future work).

closes #263
title: Fix 2d nhm for dry rising bubble

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `IntervalSets` package from `0.5` to `0.5, 0.6`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for IntervalSets to 0.6, (keep existing compat)
